title: carex orbicularis subsp. altaica
intro: Carex orbicularis subsp. altaica, also known as Altaic Oval Sedge, is a sub-species of the Carex orbicularis plant, a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Carex orbicularis subsp. altaica is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
